message:
feat(tui): add sparkline graph-score visualization to Wide issue list rows

Wire the existing render_sparkline() and heatmap_color() functions into
the issue scan line rendering.  In Wide mode (>=92 cols), a 5-char
sparkline bar now appears after the status badge, coloured via heatmap
gradient from the issue's PageRank score.  Add graph_score field to
ScanLineContext and propagate PageRank value from the analyzer metrics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
